name: findarr
description: Movie/Show discovery and request system with TMDB API integration

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@findarr/shared && npm run build --workspace=@findarr/client && npm run build --workspace=@findarr/server
scripts.test: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.test:fix: npm run type-check && npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run build
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=@findarr/client && npm run type-check --workspace=@findarr/server
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules shared/node_modules client/dist server/dist
